title: Deterministic summary leaves and bounded DAG expansion
user_task: As Eva, start from prepared Codex source ranges, inspect deterministic summary leaves, and expand only bounded summary-leaf lineage before deciding whether a full session expansion is needed.

cycle depth node-limit and token-budget omission markers

It proves public-safe leaf listing and bounded DAG expansion only; it does not prove prepared cards, watcher persistence, hook capture, model compaction, true Codex compaction-summary capture, live control, GUI mutation, or release readiness.
next_action: Implement prepared cards and inbox materialization in #410 after #409 lands.
